ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "sno" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state where the observation was made */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region where the observation was made */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases in intensive care units */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "test_kits_distributed" INTEGER /* Number of test kits distributed */,
  "total_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate of tests */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "reproduction_number" REAL /* Reproduction number (Rt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region of the location */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in rural areas */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities */,
  "beds_per_1000_population" REAL /* Number of hospital beds per 1000 population */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate of the population */,
  "lockdown_status" TEXT /* Current lockdown status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, hospital, research) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update from the source */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability score of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the upload */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the uploaded data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded file in MB */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the data */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the uploaded data (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, processing, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the upload failed */,
  "data_validation_result" TEXT /* Result of data validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "historical_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases in intensive care units */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "test_kits_distributed" INTEGER /* Number of test kits distributed */,
  "total_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate of tests */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "reproduction_number" REAL /* Reproduction number (Rt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("observation_id")
)
